title: Record shorter micro-clear window and denser status shimmer
prompt: Create reports/micro10-status-shimmer.md with sections for Micro window, Content threshold, Status shimmer, and Evidence path.

fixtureActions.content:
# Micro10 Status Shimmer Contract

## Micro window
micro-compaction keeps 10 recent messages so older tool results clear earlier in long sessions

## Content threshold
minContentTokens default is 80 so medium tool results also clear under pressure

## Status shimmer
status/notice lines shimmer under ambient effects for continuous demo-grade chrome

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + micro/status-panel/notice vitest
